text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the holiday season, and I have the day off. As
I take the opportunity to unwind a little amidst
the bustling streets...
...Trainer!
Stop right there, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I'm just one cake away from hitting my quota!
Please buy one!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
What do you mean "it's just you"? Don't be so
cold! Won't you help out your adorable trainee in
her hour of need?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She points towards a showcase in the special sales
corner, where a single cake remains on display.
choice_data_list: I guess you won't take no for answer...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Thank you! Having a trainer like you is the best!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Okay, just give me ten minutes! I'm going to get
the cake ready.
choice_data_list: Huh? Does buying a cake take that long?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Once this cake is sold, I'll be finished with
my shift. So I thought we could go somewhere
together!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, unless you already had plans? You were
wandering around by yourself, so I just assumed...
choice_data_list: Well, I don't have any plans, but...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
All right, it's decided then! I won't keep you
waiting too long!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I sit tight and wait for Ines Fujin to finish cleaning
up after her shift.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, all these cakes look so delicious! ♪ Which
one do you wanna try, Trainer?
choice_data_list: I just bought a cake from you, though...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
That was that, and this is this! Leftover cake from
work and a cake I bought myself taste completely
different!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I think I'm gonna go with the one slathered in
chocolate! ♪

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Ah! ♪ This is the bag Cassie said she liked!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Heh heh heh! I'll take it home with me as a gift
when I go back for New Year's!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin hums cheerfully as she continues her
carefree shopping spree. Something about her
seems different than usual...
choice_data_list: What's got you in such a good mood?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Oh! Ahaha, is it that obvious?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Actually, it turns out that my mom has fully
recovered! Cassie and Polly have both started
pursuing a new interest, too!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I know, right?! And that new interest I
mentioned... it's racing! They're both taking
racing lessons!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
It seems just cheering for their big sister from the
stands wasn't satisfying enough anymore! Haha.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't wipe the smirk off my face during my
entire shift. I've been dying to share the news with
someone!
choice_data_list: So that's why you invited me?
So that's why you invited me?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Hehe, that's right!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I know I'm usually frugal, but I've loosened those
purse strings for a special day like today!
Anything you've had your eye on, Trainer?
choice_data_list: I shouldn't be the one getting a gift...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Oh? You'd prefer to be the gift giver, then? I guess I'll let you have your way.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Well, I'm going to buy new shoes for my sisters,
so would you help me pick some out?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure whatever you choose will do wonders for
their progress.
choice_data_list: Got it. What features are you looking for?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Well... Cassie has well-built legs, so durable shoes
would probably be best for her. And I'd say Polly
needs a pair that are lightweight but still
practical.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, I help Ines Fujin pick out holiday presents
for her little sisters.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! I want to check out the cleats section
while we're here! Which do you recommend?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Okay then, let me borrow a smidge more of your
time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, Ines Fujin leads me to the academy
racetrack.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant... Running on the track in my regular clothes is fun, haha!
choice_data_list: You really love running, don't you?
You really love running, don't you?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Not just running—I love winning, too!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I have a hard time believing that I'll ever be
happier than I am right now.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: So that's why I really need to thank you!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I'm so glad I got to walk this journey with you. It's
because of you that I've been able to keep
running as far as I have.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: H-huh? Why am I... crying?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
S-sorry. Hmm... this is weird. I totally wasn't
planning on any of this mushy stuff...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Phew... Heh... Ahaha!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Trainer, erm. I...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: I'm glad you're my partner.
